docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FIELDS, NOBLE AS TO DEFENDANT NGYUEN, UYEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDS, NOBLE AS TO DEFENDANT NGYUEN, UYEN
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-12-2011 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIELDS, NOBLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NGYUEN, UYEN PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST UYEN NGYUEN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-07-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NGYUEN, UYEN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
